text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm READING! It's a book about how to get
faster!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And what an excellent book it is! Just reading it
makes me want to break into a full-speed dash!
choice_data_list: Can I borrow it when you're done?
Can I borrow it when you're done?

Could you run for me so I can study your
technique?

Could you run for me so I can study your
technique?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And what an excellent book it is! Just reading it
makes me want to break into a full-speed dash!
choice_data_list: Can I borrow it when you're done?
Can I borrow it when you're done?

Could you run for me so I can study your
technique?

Could you run for me so I can study your
technique?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sure! In fact, you can borrow it right now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've already absorbed all its secrets, just by
reading the table of contents!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I borrow the book from Sakura Bakushin O and
proceed to read it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh? Ohhh! You want to use me as an example?! YOU SURE CAN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Practice makes perfect, and you can't have
perfect without Bakushin! Come, feast your eyes
on my mighty Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to get a few pointers by watching
Sakura Bakushin O run.
